title: Add dockerignore override support
body:
Same feature as in Docker (https://github.com/moby/buildkit/pull/901).

Prefer `<path to Containerfile or Dockerfile>.dockerignore` or `<path to Containerfile or Dockerfile>.containerignore` over `.dockerignore`.

This allows having a separate ignore file, which is very handy when building multiple components that each need a very different context to be sent to the builder. Example: `Dockerfile.{client,server,website}{.dockerignore}`.

I wanted to write a test but couldn't make it work on macOS (`make ginkgo-remote` gives me `Failed to compile e2e: [...] build constraints exclude all Go files [...]` – maybe because it only works on Linux?).

The changed `parseDockerignore` function is mostly taken from `vendor/github.com/containers/buildah/pkg/parse/parse.go:ContainerIgnoreFile`.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

Yes.

```release-note
Added support for overriding `.dockerignore` by a more specific ignore file `<path to Containerfile or Dockerfile>.dockerignore` or `<path to Containerfile or Dockerfile>.containerignore`
```
